title: Error HTTPServerRequest: Request stream is shared by multiple threads. HTTP keep alive is not possible. Use count 2
description:
### Company or project name
### Describe what's wrong
In version 25.8.7.3, as well as after updating to version 25.8.8.26 and after updating to version 25.9.2.1
I also checked on the installation from scratch of version 25.9.2.1.
In the logs, spam errors like:
2025.10.01 12:59:43.295837 [ 10683 ] {06b6e074-ea6a-407c-b6c0-19fd6520ec11} <Error> HTTPServerRequest: Request stream is shared by multiple threads. HTTP keep alive is not possible. Use count 2
2025.10.01 12:59:45.202751 [ 10683 ] {233d8d16-fca3-4638-a092-3d44c3d5d97c} <Error> HTTPServerRequest: Request stream is shared by multiple threads. HTTP keep alive is not possible. Use count 2
2025.10.01 12:59:46.735494 [ 10683 ] {b20489da-fb1d-4a06-a1a2-b038fb4f0a9b} <Error> HTTPServerRequest: Request stream is shared by multiple threads. HTTP keep alive is not possible. Use count 2
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
Version 25.9.2.1
dbeaver was used as the client
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tabletest ON CLUSTER 'default'
(
id UInt32,
timestamp DateTime,
user_id UInt32,
message String,
large_data String
)
ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{shard}/{table}', '{replica}')
PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(timestamp)
ORDER BY (user_id, timestamp);
INSERT INTO tabletest
SELECT
number AS id,
now() + number * 10 AS timestamp,
rand() % 1000 AS user_id,
concat('Message ', toString(number)) AS message,
randomString(200) AS large_data
FROM numbers(1_000_000);
select count(*) from tabletest;
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace
2025.10.01 12:59:43.295837 [ 10683 ] {06b6e074-ea6a-407c-b6c0-19fd6520ec11} <Error> HTTPServerRequest: Request stream is shared by multiple threads. HTTP keep alive is not possible. Use count 2
2025.10.01 12:59:45.202751 [ 10683 ] {233d8d16-fca3-4638-a092-3d44c3d5d97c} <Error> HTTPServerRequest: Request stream is shared by multiple threads. HTTP keep alive is not possible. Use count 2
2025.10.01 12:59:46.735494 [ 10683 ] {b20489da-fb1d-4a06-a1a2-b038fb4f0a9b} <Error> HTTPServerRequest: Request stream is shared by multiple threads. HTTP keep alive is not possible. Use count 2
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_activity (activity_id INTEGER, user_id INTEGER, activity_time DATETIME, activity_type TEXT, details TEXT);

INSERT INTO user_activity SELECT number AS activity_id, ABS(RANDOM() % 1000) AS user_id, DATETIME('now', '+' || number * 5 || ' seconds') AS activity_time, (CASE WHEN number % 3 = 0 THEN 'login' WHEN number % 3 = 1 THEN 'logout' ELSE 'purchase' END) AS activity_type, 'Activity details for ' || number AS details FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS number FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10) LIMIT 100);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS product_sales (sale_id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER, sale_time DATETIME, quantity INTEGER, price REAL);

INSERT INTO product_sales SELECT number AS sale_id, ABS(RANDOM() % 500) AS product_id, DATETIME('now', '+' || number * 2 || ' seconds') AS sale_time, (ABS(RANDOM() % 10) + 1) AS quantity, (ABS(RANDOM() % 100) + 1) * 1.5 AS price FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS number FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10) LIMIT 50);

SELECT ua.user_id, COUNT(*) AS activity_count, SUM(ps.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM user_activity ua LEFT JOIN product_sales ps ON ua.user_id = ps.product_id WHERE ua.activity_time >= DATETIME('now', '-1 day') GROUP BY ua.user_id HAVING total_quantity > 5 ORDER BY activity_count DESC;
key_bug_features: Request stream is shared by multiple threads
